# Enrich severity band (ioc ip join)

**Dataset**: `xdr_data`

IOC enrichment — correlate live events against an indicator IP lookup via join. Enrich severity band. `if(c, a, b)` classifies inline (nest for multi-branch; `case` does not exist).

```sql
dataset = xdr_data | filter event_type = ENUM.NETWORK and action_remote_ip != null | join type = inner (dataset = gx_03_ioc_ip) as ioc ioc.indicator = action_remote_ip | replacenull action_country = "UNKNOWN" | alter sev_band = if(severity >= 90, "critical", if(severity >= 70, "high", if(severity >= 50, "medium", "low"))) | comp count() as hits by agent_hostname, threat, sev_band, action_country | sort desc hits | limit 60
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (ran clean). From the 20-scenario XQL coverage program; technique is dataset-portable._
